metadata.description: Marketplace for goalify — a Claude Code skill that prepares a self-contained, self-deleting /goal execution file you run after /clear in a fresh session.

plugins.name: goalify
plugins.description: Prepare a self-contained, self-deleting /goal execution file before you /clear: goalify researches the task, asks only the real decisions, and writes a verified, right-sized handoff so Claude Code runs your big task autonomously in a fresh, full-context session.
